benefits.description: Ulnar wrist issue healed within five days with para-care (brace, ice, mindful positioning)
Two-year shoulder tendonopathy that did not respond to months of physical therapy healed within one week
At 500mcg per day, improves mood; at 1mg per day was anhedonic

side_effects.description: At 1mg per day caused anhedonia; repeated use eventually caused anxious anhedonia

protocol_notes: Started at 500mcg twice daily; later switched to 250mcg twice daily for different purpose. Injected subcutaneously above wrist pain site. User notes this compound requires individual titration and mentions sourcing quality issues from previous vendor.
